name: Reroll Engine
description: Once per dice row, you may reroll a weak die pool.

name: Turbo Intake
description: Roll 1 extra die on each dice row.

name: Precision Gear
description: Keep 1 extra die on each dice row.

name: Heat Sink
description: Reduce fuel costs from dice by 1.

name: Orange Converter
description: Yellow dice options also count as orange.

name: Red Converter
description: Orange dice options also count as red.

name: Grip Master
description: Ignore orange traps.

name: Hazard Shell
description: Ignore red traps.

name: Coin Magnet
description: Collect coins on spaces you pass over while moving.

name: Risk Dividend
description: Gain 1 coin whenever you keep a red die.

name: Overdrive
description: Gain +1 movement on fixed move actions.

name: Refinery
description: Gain +1 extra fuel whenever you take a fuel action.

name: Red Reroll
description: Each time you roll a red die, you may reroll it once.

name: Orange Reroll
description: Each time you roll an orange die, you may reroll it once.

name: Yellow Reroll
description: Each time you roll a yellow die, you may reroll it once.

name: Red Tuning
description: You may add 1 to or subtract 1 from all red dice.

name: Orange Tuning
description: You may add 1 to or subtract 1 from all orange dice.

name: Yellow Tuning
description: You may add 1 to or subtract 1 from all yellow dice.

name: Orange Crosswire
description: When rolling orange, you may instead roll red or yellow.

name: Orange Splitter
description: When rolling orange, you may instead roll red or yellow.

name: Red Crosswire
description: When rolling red, you may instead roll orange or yellow.

name: Red Splitter
description: When rolling red, you may instead roll orange or yellow.

name: Yellow Crosswire
description: When rolling yellow, you may instead roll red or orange.

name: Yellow Splitter
description: When rolling yellow, you may instead roll red or orange.

name: Flat Cruise
description: Each time you would roll a die, you may instead move 2 spaces. This does not apply to traps.

name: Even Rounder
description: When rolling, round up to the nearest even number.

name: Parity Crash
description: All even numbers become 0. All odd numbers are doubled.

name: Parity Swing
description: Subtract 2 from all even rolls. Add 2 to all odd rolls.

name: Front-Back Balance
description: If in last place, add 3 to all rolls. If in first place, subtract 1 from all rolls.

name: Red Prediction
description: Each time someone rolls a red die, predict the result. If correct, move 2.

name: Orange Echo
description: Each time someone rolls orange dice, roll an orange die. If your result matches any of theirs, move 1.

name: Matching Doubles
description: When rolling multiple dice, if two match, move that value times 2.

name: Mismatch Surge
description: When rolling 3 or more dice, if not all match, move 6.

name: Trap Dodge
description: Once per round, you may avoid a trap.

name: Negative Mines
description: Each time you roll a negative number, place a yellow trap anywhere on the board.

name: Safe Traps
description: Traps can only move you back up to 2 spaces.

name: Trap Reset
description: You may reroll traps up to 2 times.

name: Trap Pick
description: When rolling for traps, roll an extra die and choose the result.

name: Reverse Loot
description: When moving backward from traps, collect all rewards along the path.

name: Pit Body
description: If someone lands on your space, it acts as a yellow trap.

name: Hitchhike
description: If another player starts their turn on your space, you move with them for their entire turn.

name: Slipstream Burst
description: If you pass another player, move 2.

name: Bump Draft
description: If someone passes you, move 1.

name: Contact Burst
description: If someone lands directly on your space, you move 2.

name: Four Alarm
description: Each time another player rolls a 4, move 1 after they move.

name: Coin Sweep
description: Once per turn, collect all coins along your movement path, not just the landing space.

name: Mystery Box Sweep
description: Once per turn, collect all mystery boxes along your movement path, not just the landing space.
